# sidebar-region

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Variant region for the agent-manager conversation sidebar body (classic / future dataview). Owns the switch; the parent conversations-view mount point renders its Region + Picker.
- Web:
  - Slots: `SidebarRegion.Variant` ← `conversations.conversations-view.classic`
  - Contributes: `ConfigV2.WebRegister`, `DynamicEnum.Options` "Conversation list variant", `ThemeEngine.VariantGroup` "Conversation list" → `Picker`
  - Uses: `ui/variant-region.defineVariantRegionWeb`
  - Exports: Values: `conversationsSidebarRegionWeb`, `SidebarRegion`
- Server:
  - Uses: `ui/variant-region.variantRegionServerContribution`
- Core:
  - Uses: `ui/variant-region.defineVariantRegion`
  - Exports: Types: `ConversationSidebarProps`; Values: `conversationsSidebarRegion`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations/conversations-view`, `conversations/conversations-view/classic`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
